evals.prompt:
Server feels slow but CPU is only 30%. Here is a sys.dm_os_wait_stats snapshot over the last 15 minutes. Where is the bottleneck?

wait_type, waiting_tasks_count, wait_time_ms, signal_wait_time_ms
PAGEIOLATCH_SH, 18432, 6234521, 142331
LCK_M_S, 2841, 823442, 18221
WRITELOG, 9281, 342118, 12442
CXPACKET, 481, 82221, 3221
evals.expected_output: Primary bottleneck PAGEIOLATCH_SH (V1) disk read latency. Secondary LCK_M_S (V2) blocking. Signal wait ratio low. Recommend /sqlplan-review and /sqlplan-index-advisor for the worst readers.

evals.prompt: I have two snapshots of wait stats 30 minutes apart. What waits are accumulating fastest? Are there poison waits?
evals.expected_output: Differential analysis showing fastest-growing waits per minute. Poison wait check using Brent Ozar proportional formula (V18, V13 etc). Trend analysis section.
